description: Registry of the 6 RM Account-Remediation use cases (Product doc: RM Account-Remediation Dashboard — Use Cases). CaseActionBar.astro/CaseFigure.astro expand this into one action-bar variant and one figure variant per rule_code, so the client detail page always opens with only the smart action and the figure relevant to that row's rule_code — everything else stays reusable across cases.

cases.instructions: Then draft the email you would send to the client requesting a certified copy of the renewed document, written ready for the RM to paste into Outlook. Do not call any tool for this step — it stays a draft for the RM to review and send.
Then call `escalate_row` on table `clients` with `row_id` {row_id} — do not use `update_row`. `escalate_row` will ask for confirmation (recipient email and note) and notify Compliance.
Then sketch a rebalancing proposal — what to trim, what to redeploy into, and the rough cost and tax impact — that would bring the allocation back within the agreed risk-profile tolerance.
Then run a short suitability-review questionnaire with me here in chat using what you know about the client, and summarise the answers ready for the file.

actions.label: 📨 Email client
actions.toast: ✨ Sent to me — drafting the client email
actions.instructions: Then draft the email you would send this client requesting the evidence or acknowledgement needed to re-categorise them. Use the escalate_row function to send the email.

actions.label: 🚨 Escalate to compliance
actions.toast: ✨ Sent to me — escalating to Compliance
actions.instructions: Then call `escalate_row` on table `clients` with `row_id` {row_id} — do not use `update_row`. `escalate_row` will ask for confirmation (recipient email and note) and notify Compliance.

cases.instructions: Then draft the reassessment: what changed, why this client is now in scope, and the concrete remediation options — re-categorise, re-paper, ask the client for evidence, or divest.
Then draft a Source-of-Wealth corroboration plan for this event, including which supporting documents to request from the client.
